title: Abandoned Villages
body:
# Introduction
Ever wanted to feel more isolated in the world? That you really are the sole creator? At least, that's how you want to feel, right? If that's true, then this Datapack is for you!

Villages will always spawn abandoned. The player is more isolated and the Overworld is filled with more bygone life. However, you can restore this life yourself by curing Zombie Villagers, rebuilding civilization one cure at a time!

# Information
✅ Abandoned Villages will replace Villages 99.99% of the time. ✅

✅ Iron Golem spawn chance is extremely reduced. ✅

✅ Cat spawn rate remains unchanged. ✅

⚠️ **Free to use in Modpacks when credited.** ⚠️
